mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in RSAFS indicates resilient household demand and near-term revenue support for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when the retail sales trend is rising.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value available for 2021-07-01 was 617719.0
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day forward SPX returns than lower RSAFS growth in walk-forward tests, or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains near the lower bound, equity investors price a future tightening shock and higher discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth crosses above 4% while FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%
evidence_refs: fact:2021-08 CPIAUCSL vintage value was 273.012 and FEDFUNDS was 0.09
regime_hint: inflation scare with policy rate constrained
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases or if the interaction coefficient is not negative in at least two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A falling UNRATE signals improving labor income and lower recession risk, supporting earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days after unemployment declines materially.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE declines are followed by below-baseline 60-day SPX returns in walk-forward tests or if hit rate for positive returns is below 50% across triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO over the prior 3 months signals improving production volumes and operating leverage, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days as earnings expectations are revised upward.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO growth has a nonpositive average 20-day SPX forward return after transaction-date alignment, or if rolling Rank IC is below 0.03 for any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST signals weakening interest-rate-sensitive demand and reduced future construction activity, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days after housing starts roll over.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST drawdown triggers are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered returns are not lower than non-triggered returns with p-value below 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Strong PAYEMS growth combined with accelerating CPIAUCSL signals wage and price pressure that forces tighter policy expectations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average gain exceeds 250 thousand and CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth crosses above 4%
evidence_refs: fact:2021-08 PAYEMS vintage value was 147190.0 and CPIAUCSL vintage value was 273.012
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-CPIAUCSL trigger does not underperform the unconditional 20-day SPX return by at least 1 percentage point on average in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: An upward crossing in UNRATE marks rising layoff risk and deteriorating household income expectations, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as recession risk is repriced.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its prior 6-month average by more than 0.2 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment upcrossings have a positive average 5-day SPX forward return or if downside hit rate is below 45% across triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A rising FEDFUNDS trend tightens financial conditions and increases the discount rate on future earnings, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days during sustained policy tightening.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS increases by at least 0.25 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS increase triggers are followed by above-baseline 60-day SPX returns in two consecutive walk-forward validation windows or if the estimated signal coefficient is positive.
